questions.question: Why register a tool's schema separately from its handler?
options: Because schemas have to live in YAML
So the validator stays pure data, and the handler stays opaque code
questions.explanation: Keeping the schema as data and the handler as code lets the validator be a pure function over the schema tree.
questions.question_zh: 为什么把工具的 schema 与 handler 分开注册?
options_zh: 因为 schema 必须放在 YAML 里
让 validator 保持纯数据,handler 保持不透明的代码
因为 handler 不能返回 JSON
因为 schema 必须先编译
questions.explanation_zh: 把 schema 当作数据、handler 当作代码,validator 就能成为对 schema 树的纯函数。

questions.question: Which keywords are intentionally outside the subset this lesson implements?
questions.explanation: The omitted keywords add cycles and reference resolution. We keep the subset linear so the validator stays a single recursive walk.
questions.question_zh: 本节有意未实现哪些关键字?
options_zh: type、properties、required
minLength、maxLength、pattern
oneOf、anyOf、$ref、allOf
items、enum
questions.explanation_zh: 被省略的关键字会引入循环和引用解析。我们让子集保持线性,validator 就只是一次递归遍历。

questions.question: Why does register() reject duplicates by default?
options: Because the registry cannot store more than one record per name
Silent overwrites are the cause of production tool catalog drift
Because the schema cannot be re-validated
questions.explanation: Forcing override=True surfaces the case where two parts of the code intend to own the same tool name.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 register() 默认拒绝重复名称?
options_zh: 因为 registry 不能为同一名字保存多条记录
静默覆盖是生产工具目录漂移的根源
因为 schema 不能重新校验
因为 handler 不能被替换
questions.explanation_zh: 强制传 override=True 会暴露出代码两处都想拥有同一工具名的情况。

questions.question: What does the validator do when a schema specifies type integer but receives the value True?
options: Returns a type error because bool is not integer in this validator
questions.explanation: Python bool is a subclass of int, but the validator filters bool out of the integer check. JSON booleans and integers are distinct.
questions.question_zh: 当 schema 指定 type=integer 但收到值 True 时,validator 怎么处理?
options_zh: 把 True 当作 1 通过校验
返回类型错误,因为本 validator 不把 bool 当作 integer
抛出未捕获异常
静默地把它转为 integer
questions.explanation_zh: Python 中 bool 是 int 的子类,但 validator 在 integer 检查中过滤掉了 bool。JSON 中 boolean 与 integer 是两类。

questions.question: When the input object is {'user': {'email': 0}} and the schema requires user.email to be a string, what is the error path?
questions.explanation: JSON pointer encodes the descent through user then email as /user/email.
questions.question_zh: 当输入对象是 {'user': {'email': 0}}、schema 要求 user.email 为 string 时,错误路径是什么?
options_zh: /user
/user/email
user.email
questions.explanation_zh: JSON pointer 用 /user/email 表示沿 user 再到 email 的下钻路径。

questions.question: Why is the registry not a security boundary?
options: Because handlers can still misbehave after validation passes
questions.explanation: The registry checks shape. Behavior, timeouts, and isolation belong to the dispatcher and the sandbox.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 registry 不是安全边界?
options_zh: 因为校验通过后 handler 仍可能行为不当
因为 handler 是 async 的
因为 schema 是 JSON
因为 registry 在进程内
questions.explanation_zh: Registry 检查的是结构。行为、超时与隔离属于 dispatcher 和 sandbox。
